security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' asset: http://localhost:* data: blob:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost 'self' http://localhost:* ws://localhost:*; worker-src 'self' blob:; media-src 'self' http://localhost:* blob:
